chunks.title: Judgment on Leadership
chunks.reason: Describes the removal of key leaders and the rise of young rulers.

chunks.title: The Reluctant Ruler
chunks.reason: A short dialogue illustrating the desperation of the people and the refusal of a candidate.

chunks.title: Reasons for Judgment
chunks.reason: Explains the spiritual cause of the fall and the chaos resulting from poor leadership.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Court Case
chunks.reason: God stands to judge and specifically indicts the elders and princes.

chunks.title: Judgment on Daughters of Zion
chunks.reason: A detailed catalog of removed ornaments followed by the resulting humiliation.

chunks.title: Final Consequences
chunks.reason: Describes the death of men and the desolation of the city gates.
